title: Cuisine du Nord Tourtiere Spice Blend - Quebecois Meat Pie Seasoning, 3 oz
description: Authentic Quebecois tourtiere spice blend hand-mixed in Portland, Oregon. Warm notes of cinnamon, clove, savory and white pepper season classic pork, wild game, or vegetarian meat pies. Shelf-stable and resealable.
bulletPoints: Authentic Quebecois tourtiere seasoning|Cinnamon, clove, savory and white pepper blend|Hand-mixed in small batches in Portland, OR|Seasons one to two large meat pies|Resealable shelf-stable pouch, 3 oz

title: Cuisine du Nord Quebecois Maple Butter - Pure Spreadable Maple Cream, 8 oz
description: Pure spreadable maple butter whipped from Grade A amber maple syrup. A Quebecois staple for toast, crepes, tourtiere glaze, or maple creme brulee. No additives or preservatives.
bulletPoints: Pure whipped Quebecois maple butter|Made from Grade A amber maple syrup|Spreadable cream texture, no additives|Perfect on toast, crepes and desserts|8 oz resealable glass jar

title: Cuisine du Nord Cretons Seasoning Kit - Quebecois Pork Spread Spice Mix
description: Everything you need to season homemade cretons, the classic Quebecois pork spread. Includes a balanced blend of onion, clove, cinnamon and allspice with a step-by-step recipe card. Just add ground pork and milk.
bulletPoints: Make authentic Quebecois cretons at home|Onion, clove, cinnamon and allspice blend|Includes printed recipe card|Seasons up to two pounds of ground pork|Shelf-stable spice kit

title: Cuisine du Nord Tourtiere Pastry Mix - Flaky Meat Pie Crust, 16 oz
description: All-butter style pastry mix for a flaky double-crust tourtiere. Just add cold butter and water for a tender, golden crust every time. Enough mix for a top and bottom crust on one nine-inch pie.
bulletPoints: Flaky double-crust tourtiere pastry mix|All-butter style, no shortening|Makes top and bottom crust for a 9-inch pie|Simple add-butter-and-water preparation|16 oz resealable bag

title: Cuisine du Nord Maple Creme Brulee Kit - Quebecois Dessert, 4 Servings
description: Restaurant-style maple creme brulee made easy at home. Kit includes maple-infused custard base mix and turbinado sugar for the caramelized top. Yields four ramekin servings. A signature Cuisine du Nord dessert.
bulletPoints: Maple creme brulee dessert kit|Includes custard base mix and turbinado sugar|Yields four ramekin servings|Quebecois maple flavor|Shelf-stable, just add cream and eggs
